title: 遠くの地より花は来りて

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hey, Groove! Listen! My flowers bloomed!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh? Did they now? Well done, Fine!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: No, it's all thanks to you, Groove! After all...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... This flower is so delicate that even a
touch when it's budding can cause it to wither.
But once they get larger you... cut them?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Are those flower seeds?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes. My elder sister sent them to me! I'm reading
up on how to grow them, but...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It says here they're recommended for advanced
gardeners! I see a looot of researching in my
future.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Nonsense. You have someone right here with the
requisite knowledge. If you're not confident, then
don't hesitate to ask me for help.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure, Groove? You're always so busy,
even without me bothering you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Of course. There's no need to take on this task
alone. Those seeds would lament having traveled
all the way from another country only to never
sprout.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Look at how much they've grown—all thanks to
you, Groove! These flowers and I are both in your
debt!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I just sent her a picture to let her know they
bloomed!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, here she is now!

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
Hello, my lovely princess. It appears you've
successfully raised flowers befitting your own
beauty! Well done!

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and who's that I spy towards the edge of the
screen?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...I-it's nice to see you again.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text: ...I don't believe it.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
It's Her Majesty, the Empress of my heart! I could
never forget that fiery gaze! It seems I made the
right decision sending those flower seeds!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: The right decision... Are you saying you planned all of this?!

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
When I saw seeds for flowers that are difficult to
raise, I thought perhaps the goddess of flowers
might smile upon my sister. I merely decided to
bet on that chance.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
I would so like a chance to speak to you directly.
Shall I travel to you? I'll bring a bouquet filled
with my feelings of yearning, praise, and ardor!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Unfortunately I have prior business to
attend to. Another time, perhaps!

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
It appears she's gone. How regrettable. If only we
were standing on the same turf, I'd catch her for
sure!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for sending the flower seeds. It was a
bit challenging, but it ended up being a good
experience.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I simply wanted to enjoy a conversation
with the Empress. One could say that I used you
to that end.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if that's true. You went out of your way
to send me seeds that I could only care for with
help...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure you weren't trying to teach me to
depend on the kindness of others? Just like that
one time...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Wait! Don't go!

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong, my princess? Your rosy cheeks
have turned pale. You should retire to your room
and rest.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I just wanted to say... if you hadn't come to the
press conference, I imagine it would still be going
on.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...So, thank you. I was surprised when you showed
up all of a sudden, but you came to wrap it up for
me, right?

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
What ever do you mean? I simply couldn't wait to
talk with my adorable little sister. Now then, shall
we take our leave?

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
And by the way, Fine... You really ought to learn
to ask those around you for help.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you. I may still be a bit awkward, but at
least I was able to receive a bit of kindness from
another.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
That's splendid. Although, once again, I merely
seized upon a fortuitous opportunity to speak
with Her Highness, the Empress.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I understand. All the same, please allow me
to give you a token of my thanks.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Older Sister
text_block_list.text: Are you sure? Should I be excited?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Please await your reward with bated
breath!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...And that's why I brought this back with me!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
As for my sister's thank-you gift, I'm still not sure
what to do. Should I send her something?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps something related to Groove? Or... do
you have any ideas?
choice_data_list:
What if the two of you cooked something for
her?
You could challenge her to a race.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's a great idea. Thank you! I'll get Groove to
teach me how to cook!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And if we send it via private jet, we can get it to
her fresh... In any case, I'll go talk to Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I might've put Air Groove into an awkward spot,
but it is nice to hear about the warm bond
between Fine Motion and her sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that a race between the two of them
might please her sister, as she'd get to show her
just how much she's learned.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I see! In other words, I'd be the present!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That sounds interesting! What better way to
repay my sister for supporting my decision to
study here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Two Umamusume linked by a powerful bond
running in distant lands. I'd love to see a dream
match between them one day.
